description: Backend-bug tasks for the rewynd agent benchmark. Each scenario is recorded as a real rewynd trace (see ../../core/cmd/eval-seed). An agent diagnoses the root cause WITH rewynd (it can inspect the trace) vs WITHOUT (only the source + application logs).

tasks.root_cause: order.total is never computed, so the INSERT sends NULL into the NOT NULL `total` column — Postgres rejects it.
N+1 query: the handler runs one SELECT on posts per user in a loop (50+ identical queries).
The outbound call to the payments provider (payments.acme.com/v1/charge) returned 500; the handler maps that to a 502.

tasks.request: An email.send background job failed (no HTTP request)
tasks.root_cause: The email.send job threw SMTPConnectError: connection refused to smtp.mailer.internal:587.
